summary: This document outlines proposed content and UI structure for a companion web interface, including landing, signup, and login pages. It details user flow elements like buttons, forms, and visual feedback areas intended for family members interacting with the care assistant. The content emphasizes emotional benefits such as warmth and safety alongside technical functionality.
